ekino.description: Participation in the Royal Canin micro-frontends e-commerce revamp and fullstack development on the open-source platform Vitality.
ekino.longDescription: As an apprentice developer at Ekino, I worked on two major projects. On Vitality (open-source platform: https://github.com/ekino/v6y), I handled fullstack development and maintenance (Next.js, GraphQL, PostgreSQL, Node.js, Express) with a strong contribution to the architecture, authentication flows, and performance analysis algorithms. I also participated in the Royal Canin E-Commerce Revamp project, a redesign and migration of a legacy platform to a scalable micro-frontend ecosystem (React.js, TypeScript, TanStack Query, Zustand, Jest, Nx monorepo).
highlights: Fullstack development on Vitality (open source, Next.js/Node.js/GraphQL)
Architecture, authentication flows, and performance analysis algorithms
Large-scale e-commerce micro-frontend revamp for Royal Canin
Migration of a legacy stack to React.js, TanStack Query, Zustand, Nx

intm.description: Prospecting major accounts to match needs with tech human resources (digital, cloud and data). Part-time fixed-term contract alongside studies.
intm.longDescription: As a Business Manager at INTM Groupe, I handled commercial prospecting with major accounts to identify their tech HR needs, primarily focused on digital, cloud and data. My role involved understanding clients' technical challenges, proposing suitable profiles and supporting the placement process. This part-time position, held alongside my studies, allowed me to develop skills in commercial negotiation, understanding of tech roles and B2B client relationship management.

live-efrei-president.description: Leading an association of 120 members. Managing a team of 12 people, organizing concerts of 400+ attendees, budgetary and administrative management. Developing the association's website.
live-efrei-president.longDescription: At the head of Live Efrei, the school's music association, I led a team of 12 department heads and coordinated the activities of 120 active members. My role encompassed budget management (sponsor negotiation, expense tracking), logistics of concerts hosting over 400 people, as well as communication and relations with the school administration. I also developed the association's website, allowing members to check rehearsal schedules, register for events and share musical resources.
highlights: Leading a team of 12 department heads

bda-efrei-vp.description: Organizing the end-of-year show (theater, music, dance) bringing together all artistic associations. Developing the bda-efrei.fr website.
bda-efrei-vp.longDescription: As Vice-President of EFREI's Arts Association, I co-organize the end-of-year show, a major event combining theater, music and dance, bringing together all the school's artistic associations. My role involves inter-association coordination, logistics planning, rehearsal management and event communication. I also developed the association's website (bda-efrei.fr) to centralize information, registrations and promote artistic activities to students.
highlights: Communication and promotion of artistic events

bds-efrei-tech.description: Development of 3 apps (training management, excused absences, showcase website). Partner prospecting and management.
bds-efrei-tech.longDescription: Within EFREI's Sports Association, I hold a dual role as tech lead and partnerships manager. On the tech side, I developed and improved three applications: a training management app for sports clubs, an app to simplify administrative documents for excused absences, and the main showcase website displaying clubs, training schedules and team results automatically fetched via FFSU scraping. On the partnerships side, I handle prospecting new partners and managing existing relationships to fund the association's sports activities.
highlights: Development of a training management app
Showcase website with automatic FFSU results scraping
